v1.12.40
https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/v1.12.40/sherpa-onnx-v1.12.40-macos-xcframework-static.tar.bz2

Tarball SHA256:    0417b325c4e856e65cc37862a3f599e8b7e6f7b47de666e1f4be7d4c87e9e97b
libsherpa-onnx.a SHA256: e54781899641ad6d9fe68c2d06ae97bb90a2e59a05bb2659699a3213e7415ef3

Update procedure:
1. Replace the tarball URL above with the new release asset URL.
2. Download and extract the tarball into Murmur/vendor/, e.g.:
     curl -L -o /tmp/sherpa-onnx.tar.bz2 \
       "https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/<NEW_TAG>/sherpa-onnx-<NEW_TAG>-macos-xcframework-static.tar.bz2"
     tar -xjf /tmp/sherpa-onnx.tar.bz2 -C Murmur/vendor/
     rm /tmp/sherpa-onnx.tar.bz2
   This should yield Murmur/vendor/sherpa-onnx.xcframework/.
3. Recompute the SHA256 hashes above:
     shasum -a 256 /tmp/sherpa-onnx.tar.bz2  # (before deleting)
     shasum -a 256 Murmur/vendor/sherpa-onnx.xcframework/macos-arm64_x86_64/libsherpa-onnx.a
   and update both lines.
4. Re-add the `module.modulemap` at
   Murmur/vendor/sherpa-onnx.xcframework/macos-arm64_x86_64/Headers/module.modulemap
   (see Murmur/Services/Vendor/SherpaOnnx.swift's `import SherpaOnnxC` for the
   module name expected).
5. Replace Murmur/Services/Vendor/SherpaOnnx.swift from the matching tag and
   re-add `import SherpaOnnxC` at the top if the upstream copy omits it.
6. swift test --filter FireRedTranscriptionServiceTests

License: Apache-2.0 (see Murmur/vendor/sherpa-onnx-LICENSE.txt)
